query:
INSERT INTO surveys (customerId, status, scheduledDate, scheduledTime, systemSize, panelCount, inverterModel, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1440115, 'scheduled', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW() + INTERVAL 3 DAY) * 1000, '10:00', 10.00, 20, 'Huawei SUN2000-10KTL', 90361, NOW(), NOW());
